full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 24.25 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 500 uL Dispase, and 250 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 1 mL of iPDS medium, diluted 1:10, and counted the cells.

Assel Kalmenova performed the tissue dissociation.

Ashwini Nagaraj performed plating of the cells in OmGel for drug treatments in 48 and 384 well plates.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 5.13 E6

live: 3.34 E6

viability: 65%

size: 9.5 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 5.04 E6

live: 3.31 E6

viability: 65.6 %

size: 10.4 um

Total cell count: 50.85 E6

Total volume: 1 mL

Overall # of cells in 1 mL was 50.85 E6.

I took 2 E6 cells (in 2 Eppendorf tubes) for flow cytometry staining, and the rest (48 E6) was seeded in 48-well and 384-well plates for drug experiments.

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

11 conditions, 6 replicates per condition =66wells

66 wells x 40

1000 cells/µl = 2.0 E6 * 4 tubes

4 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1000 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

713

221 µl

µl

µl

µl

Plate 40 uL per well in 48 well plate * 4 see the map below.

300 uL medium + 50 ul of diluted drugs per well were added next day same day.

B) Drug treatment for IF (384 well plate):

20 uL per well of the omentum gel mixture prepared above was plated in 384 well plate. The gel was allowed to solidify for 1hr in the cell culture incubator, followed by addition of 25 ul of culture medium per well. Followed by dispensing of the drugs using TECAN drug dispense next day.

For ATXi and ATRi single and combination treatment for flow cytometry analysis

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL (prepare 600uL)

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

IC50 of ATRi (Berzosertib (VE-822) is 19 nM on cell lines (https://www.selleckchem.com/products/ve-822.html)

Stock concentration of ATRi is 10mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and used for further dilutions indicated in this table for 48 well plates.

Dilute to 1mM for 384 well plate

IC50 of ATXi Ziritaxestat (GLPG1690) is 130 nM on cell lines (https://www.medchemexpress.com/GLPG1690.html)

Stock concentration of ATXi is 1mM, dilute to 0.1 mM (for 48 well plate), and 1mM for (384 well plate) in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

Prepare 3 mg /mL pembrolizumab for treatment in 384 well plate

Prepare 0.75% Tween 20 in 1xPBS = 75uL tween 20 + 10 mL of 1x PBS

Dilute stock Pembrolizumab (5mg/mL) to get a final concentration of 0. 3% tween 20 = 15uL of stock pembrolizumab + 10mL of 0.75 % Tween 20.

28.05.2024

On day 4 of the drug treatment, cells from 48 wells were harvested for flow cytometry. Cells from 384 wells were stained with live/dye marker, and fixed in 384 well plate and stored in +4.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Volume per ml (ul)
Omentum gel | 11.3 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 221
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 3
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 3
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 20
